_notes: Standard API list prices, $/MTok. Source: https://claude.com/pricing#api
A model may map to a LIST of dated periods: the entry whose 'until'
(inclusive) covers the date applies; the entry without 'until' is the
open/standing rate. Cache pricing derives from cache_multipliers times
the input rate. family_fallback names the anchor model used when a raw
model id matches no versioned key. Refreshed by tools/refresh_pricing.py
via a REVIEWED weekly PR - the widget itself never touches the network.
